creator: areilly@bigpond.net.au
text:
On Fri, May 09, 2008 at 01:06:38AM -0300, Felippe de Meirelles Motta wrote:
> Hi submitter,
> 
> This port has been changed in the last days, fixing building problems
> on !i386 plataforms. Can you please, test it again and feedback us
> about any problems ? If no problems was found, permit us close this,
> thanks.

Re-built over the weekend, with the bridge option enabled.
Seems to have installed fine.  Thanks!  I'd say it's OK to
close.

Cheers,

-- 
Andrew
